Lower earnings and years worked at the initial employer are offset by gains in other manufacturing industries, construction, and services. Canadian workers quickly transitioned out of industries facing import competition, with the majority of industry adjustment occurring among new entrants to the labor market.
29793.zh_abstract: 本文利用1984-2004年的纵向行政匹配数据，评估了1988年《加美自由贸易协定》对加拿大劳动力市场的长期影响。我们同时考察了出口扩张和进口竞争加剧的劳动力市场效应，总体发现加拿大关税削减带来不利影响，而美国关税削减则产生有利影响，但两种效应均较小。最初受雇于经历较大加拿大关税减让行业的工人，在大公司被解雇的概率更高，但对长期累积收入影响甚微。在初始雇主处较低的工资和工作年限，被其他制造业、建筑业和服务业的收益所抵消。加拿大工人迅速从面临进口竞争的行业转移出来，行业调整的主体发生在劳动力市场的新进入者中。
29793.meta: Programs：ITI, LS；JEL：F13, F16, F66, J23, J31

29792.title: The Effects of the Emeryville Fair Workweek Ordinance on the Daily Lives of Low-Wage Workers and their Families
29792.zh_title: 《埃默里维尔公平工作周条例》对低工资工人及其家庭日常生活的影响
29792.authors: Elizabeth Ananat, Anna Gassman-Pines, John Fitz-Henley II
29792.abstract: Emeryville, CA’s Fair Workweek Ordinance (FWO) aimed to reduce service workers’ schedule unpredictability by requiring large retail and food service employers to provide advanced notice of schedules and to compensate workers for last-minute schedule changes. From a 1-in-6 sample of Emeryville retail and food service workers with young children (58 percent working in regulated businesses at baseline, the rest in the same industries in firms below the size cutoff for regulation), this study gathered daily reports of work schedule unpredictability and worker and family well-being over three waves before and after FWO implementation (N=6,059 observations). The FWO decreased working parents’ schedule unpredictability relative to those in similar jobs at unregulated establishments. The FWO also decreased parents’ days worked while increasing hours per work day, leaving total hours roughly unchanged. Finally, parent well-being improved, with significant declines in sleep difficulty.
29792.zh_abstract: 加利福尼亚州埃默里维尔的《公平工作周条例》旨在通过要求大型零售和食品服务雇主提前通知排班，并对临时排班变动给予补偿，来减少服务行业工人的排班不可预测性。本研究从埃默里维尔有幼儿的零售和食品服务工人中抽取六分之一样本（基线时58%在受监管企业工作，其余在同一行业但规模低于监管门槛的企业工作），在条例实施前后三个波次中收集了关于工作排班不可预测性以及工人和家庭福祉的每日报告（观测值N=6059）。该条例降低了在职父母相对于在未受监管机构从事类似工作者的排班不可预测性。该条例还减少了父母的工作天数，同时增加了每个工作日的工时，总工时基本保持不变。最后，父母福祉得到改善，睡眠困难显著减少。

29791.title: Selection Into Public Service: Evidence from School Board Elections
29791.zh_title: 公共服务的选择：来自学校董事会选举的证据
29791.authors: Stephen B. Billings, Hugh Macartney, Geunyong Park, John D. Singleton
29791.abstract: In this paper, we use narrowly-decided elections and housing transactions data to test for private returns from public office in the context of school boards in the U.S. We find no detectable effect of election to the school board on home prices in the neighborhoods of winning candidates. Stratifying by political affiliation reveals that homes appreciate in winning Republicans' neighborhoods, but the estimate is not statistically robust. We do not find corresponding evidence for improvements in local school productivity, but we show that neighborhood public schools of Republican members also shift to serving more white students through attendance zone adjustments.
29791.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用以微弱优势决定的选举和住房交易数据，以美国学校董事会为背景，检验公职的私人回报。我们发现，当选学校董事会对获胜候选人所在社区的房价没有可检测的影响。按政治派别分层显示，获胜共和党人所在社区的房价升值，但该估计在统计上不稳健。我们没有发现当地学校生产率改善的相应证据，但我们表明，共和党成员所在社区的公立学校也通过学区调整，转向服务更多白人学生。
29791.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：D72, H75, I24

29790.title: Calling All Issuers: The Market for Debt Monitoring
29790.zh_title: 召集所有发行人：债务监控市场
29790.authors: Huaizhi Chen, Lauren Cohen, Weiling Liu
29790.abstract: 95% of long-term municipal bonds have callable features, and yet we find new evidence of a substantial fraction of local governments exercising these valuable options sub-optimally, with significant delays – resulting in sizable losses. Using data from 2001 to 2018, we estimate that U.S. municipals lost over $\$26$ billion from delayed refinancing, whereas the entire U.S. corporate sector, facing the same low interest-rate environment, lost only a comparatively modest $\$1.4$ billion. We present evidence that these delays are related to gaps in localized debt monitoring. For instance, when a bond’s call unlocks in a month that is the fiscal year-end of a local government – a particularly busy time for finance departments – the decision to call is delayed significantly longer. A significantly longer delay also occurs when a municipality is faced with waves of calls all coming due at once. These effects are magnified in smaller municipalities, staffed with smaller finance departments. Moreover, the market for outside monitoring (e.g., underwriters), is a fractured one. It is characterized by extreme stickiness: 87% of a municipality’s bonds are issued with the same underwriter over our sample period. The usage of a less locally-focused underwriter is associated with significantly greater delays.
29790.zh_abstract: 95%的长期市政债券具有可赎回特征，然而我们发现新证据表明，相当一部分地方政府在行使这些有价值的期权时表现欠佳，存在显著延迟，从而导致巨额损失。利用2001年至2018年的数据，我们估计美国市政部门因延迟再融资损失超过260亿美元，而整个美国企业部门在相同的低利率环境下，仅损失相对较小的14亿美元。我们提供的证据表明，这些延迟与本地化债务监控的缺口有关。例如，当债券的赎回权在地方政府财政年度末（财务部门特别繁忙的时期）解锁时，赎回决策的延迟显著更长。当市政当局面临一波同时到期的赎回时，也会出现显著更长的延迟。这些效应在财务部门规模较小的较小市政当局中被放大。此外，外部监控市场（例如承销商）是一个碎片化的市场。其特点是极端粘性：在我们的样本期内，一个市政当局87%的债券由同一承销商发行。使用较少本地化关注的承销商与显著更长的延迟相关。
29790.meta: Programs：AP, PE, POL；JEL：G18, G21, G24, G28, G32, G38, H7, H74

29789.title: Where Do My Tax Dollars Go? Tax Morale Effects of Perceived Government Spending
29789.zh_title: 我的税款去哪儿了？感知政府支出对纳税道德的影响
29789.authors: Matias Giaccobasso, Brad C. Nathan, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Alejandro Zentner
29789.abstract: Do perceptions about government spending affect willingness to pay taxes? We test this hypothesis with a natural field experiment that focuses on the allocation of property taxes to public schools. Our results show that taxpayers often misperceive the destination of their tax dollars. By introducing shocks to households’ perceptions via an information-provision experiment, we find that perceptions of how tax dollars are used significantly affect the probability of filing a tax appeal. Moreover, the effects are consistent with reciprocal motivations: individuals are more willing to pay taxes if they believe that the government services funded by those taxes will provide greater personal benefit.
29789.zh_abstract: 关于政府支出的看法是否会影响纳税意愿？我们通过一项聚焦于房产税向公立学校分配的自然实地实验来检验这一假设。我们的结果表明，纳税人常常误解其税款的去向。通过信息提供实验引入对家庭认知的冲击，我们发现，对税款使用方式的看法显著影响提交税务上诉的概率。此外，这些效应与互惠动机一致：如果个人认为由这些税款资助的政府服务将为其带来更大的个人利益，他们更愿意纳税。
29789.meta: Programs：ED, LE, PE, POL；JEL：C93, H26, I22, Z13

29788.title: Ideas Have Consequences: The Impact of Law and Economics on American Justice
29788.zh_title: 思想有后果：法律经济学对美国司法的影响
29788.authors: Elliott Ash, Daniel L. Chen, Suresh Naidu
29788.abstract: This paper provides a quantitative analysis of the effects of the early law-and- economics movement on the U.S. judiciary. We focus on the Manne Economics Institute for Federal Judges, an intensive economics course that trained almost half of federal judges between 1976 and 1999. Using the universe of published opinions in U.S. Circuit Courts and 1 million District Court criminal sentencing decisions, we estimate the within-judge effect of Manne program attendance. Selection into attendance was limited—the program was popular across judges from all backgrounds, was regularly oversubscribed, and admitted judges on a first-come first-served basis—and results are robust to a variety of automatically selected covariates predicting the timing of attendance. We find that after attending economics training, participating judges use more economics language in their opinions, issue more conservative decisions in economics-related cases, rule against regulatory agencies more often, favor more lax enforcement in antitrust cases, and impose more/longer criminal sentences. The law-and- economics movement had policy consequences via its influence on U.S. federal judges.
29788.zh_abstract: 本文对早期法律经济学运动对美国司法机构的影响进行了定量分析。我们聚焦于曼恩联邦法官经济学研究所，这是一个在1976年至1999年间培训了近半数联邦法官的强化经济学课程。利用美国巡回法院已发表意见的全部数据和100万份地区法院刑事量刑决定，我们估算了参加曼恩项目的法官个体内效应。参加的选择性有限——该项目在所有背景的法官中都很受欢迎，经常超额认购，并按先到先得原则录取法官——结果对自动选择的预测参加时间的各种协变量具有稳健性。我们发现，在参加经济学培训后，参与法官在其意见中使用了更多经济学语言，在与经济相关的案件中做出了更保守的裁决，更频繁地裁定监管机构败诉，在反垄断案件中倾向于更宽松的执行，并施加了更多/更长的刑事判决。法律经济学运动通过其对美国联邦法官的影响产生了政策后果。

29787.title: Causality and Econometrics
29787.zh_title: 因果关系与计量经济学
29787.abstract: This paper examines the econometric causal model for policy analysis developed by the seminal ideas of Ragnar Frisch and Trygve Haavelmo. We compare the econometric causal model with two popular causal frameworks: Neyman-Holland causal model and the do-calculus. The Neyman-Holland causal model is based on the language of potential outcomes and was largely developed by statisticians. The do-calculus, developed by Judea Pearl and co-authors, relies on Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) and is a popular causal framework in computer science. We make the case that economists who uncritically use these approximating frameworks often discard the substantial benefits of the econometric causal model to the detriment of more informative economic policy analyses. We illustrate the versatility and capabilities of the econometric framework using causal models that are frequently studied by economists.
29787.zh_abstract: 本文考察了由拉格纳·弗里希和特里格夫·哈维尔莫的开创性思想发展起来的、用于政策分析的计量经济学因果模型。我们将计量经济学因果模型与两种流行的因果框架进行比较：内曼-霍兰德因果模型和do-演算。内曼-霍兰德因果模型基于潜在结果的语言，主要由统计学家发展。do-演算由朱迪亚·珀尔及其合著者发展，依赖于有向无环图，是计算机科学中流行的因果框架。我们论证，不加批判地使用这些近似框架的经济学家，往往丢弃了计量经济学因果模型的实质性优势，从而损害了更具信息量的经济政策分析。我们使用经济学家经常研究的因果模型，来说明计量经济学框架的通用性和能力。

29786.title: Seeing the Future: A Better Way to Model and Test for Adaptive Developmental Plasticity
29786.zh_title: 预见未来：建模和检验适应性发育可塑性的更好方法
29786.authors: Anup Malani, Stacy Rosenbaum, Susan C. Alberts, Elizabeth A. Archie
29786.abstract: Early life conditions can have profound effects on individual health, longevity, and biological fitness. Two classes of hypotheses are used to explain the evolutionary origins of these effects: developmental constraints (DC) hypotheses, which focus on the deleterious effects of low-quality early-life environments, and predictive adaptive response (PAR) models, which focus on organisms’ predictions about their adult environment, phenotypic adaptations based on that prediction, and the deleterious consequences of incorrect predictions. Despite their popularity, these ideas remain poorly defined. To remedy this, we provide mathematical definitions for DC, PARs, and related concepts, and develop statistical tests derived from these definitions. We use simulations to demonstrate that PARs are more readily detected by tests based on quadratic regressions than by tests based on more commonly used interaction regression models. We demonstrate that the poor performance of interaction models stems from two problems: first, they are mathematically incapable of detecting a central prediction of PAR, and second, they conceptually conflate PARs with DC. We conclude by providing recommendations for how researchers can make use of explicit definitions and properly-aligned visualizations and statistical tests to make progress in this important research area.
29786.zh_abstract: 早期生活条件可能对个体健康、寿命和生物适应性产生深远影响。有两类假说用于解释这些效应的进化起源：发育约束假说，侧重于低质量早期生活环境的有害效应；以及预测性适应反应模型，侧重于生物体对其成年环境的预测、基于该预测的表型适应以及错误预测的有害后果。尽管这些观点很流行，但它们仍然定义不清。为弥补这一点，我们为发育约束、预测性适应反应及相关概念提供了数学定义，并基于这些定义开发了统计检验。我们使用模拟证明，基于二次回归的检验比基于更常用的交互回归模型的检验更容易检测到预测性适应反应。我们证明，交互模型表现不佳源于两个问题：首先，它们在数学上无法检测预测性适应反应的核心预测；其次，它们在概念上将预测性适应反应与发育约束混为一谈。最后，我们为研究人员如何利用明确定义以及适当对齐的可视化和统计检验，在这一重要研究领域取得进展提供了建议。
